text: Our basic plan costs nine dollars per month with all core features included.
The premium plan is twenty-nine dollars per month and adds advanced analytics.
Annual billing saves you twenty percent compared to month to month payments.
Enterprise pricing is custom; please contact sales for a quote tailored to your team size.
There is no charge for unused seats; you only pay for active users each month.
You can start a free fourteen day trial without entering a credit card.
After your trial ends you keep access to your data for thirty days before deletion.
During the trial you have access to every feature on the premium plan with no limits.
We offer a full refund within thirty days of purchase, no questions asked.
To request a refund, email support and include your order number.
You can change your password from the security section of your profile settings.
To delete your account, go to settings and choose close account at the bottom of the page.
You can invite teammates by sharing the workspace invite link from team settings.
Multi factor authentication is available and recommended for all accounts.
We support exporting your data to CSV, JSON, and Parquet at any time.
Our API has a generous rate limit of one thousand requests per minute on the premium plan.
Webhooks let you trigger external systems when records change in your workspace.
Single sign on through Google, Okta, and Microsoft is available on enterprise plans.
You can integrate with Slack to receive notifications about important workspace events.
Our support team replies within one business day for all paid plans.
Live chat is available during business hours for premium and enterprise customers.
You can find our extensive documentation and tutorials at our help center.
For urgent issues, enterprise customers have access to a twenty four seven phone support line.
All data is encrypted at rest with AES two hundred fifty six and in transit with TLS one point three.
We are SOC two type two certified and complete an annual third party audit.
You can enable session timeouts and IP allow listing on enterprise plans.
Customer data is never used to train any machine learning models.
Backups run every six hours and are retained for thirty days.
Data residency in the European Union, United States, and Asia Pacific is available.
You retain ownership of all data uploaded to your workspace at all times.
